name: DOTMed Shield - CDL Medical Compliance Platform
concept: AI-powered DOT medical card compliance platform for trucking companies. Tracks CDL driver medical certifications, predicts expirations, schedules exams, and automates documentation for DOT audits.
target_market: Trucking companies with 20+ commercial drivers (150K fleets)
business_model: B2B SaaS - Small fleet $500/mo, Mid fleet $1,500/mo, Large fleet $4,000/mo + $2/driver/mo

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: $1,000+ daily loss per driver out of service, DOT audit fines $1,000-10K per non-compliant driver

ai_advantage: Expiration prediction: ML predicts driver medical card expiration risk based on age, conditions, medical history
AME network optimization: NLP-based matching of drivers to certified medical examiners
Audit document generation: Auto-generates DOT audit-ready medical compliance reports
Condition risk scoring: AI analyzes driver health conditions for DOT disqualification risk
competitive_advantage: Proprietary database of 50,000+ DOT medical examiners with specialization data
Integration with DOT clearinghouse and FMCSA systems
primary_risks: Integration complexity with legacy fleet management systems
Regulatory changes to DOT medical requirements
